extension.description: Converts `.slnx` to `.sln` inside the extension, deletes `.slnx`, and updates `dotnet.defaultSolution` (no Python required).
command.convertWorkspace.title: SLNX: Convert all .slnx in workspace
command.disableUnityVsCodePatch.title: SLNX: Disable Unity .vscode auto-patch (.vstupatchdisable)
config.title: SLNX Auto Convert
config.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for `.slnx` create/change events.
config.watchEnabled.description: Enable automatic conversion via file watching.
config.autoCreateVstuPatchDisable.descri: If missing, create `.vscode/.vstupatchdisable` before conversion (suppresses Unity settings auto-patch).
